import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { LineChart, Line, BarChart, Bar, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; import api from '../../services/api'; const EnhancedDashboard = () => { const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalUsers: 0, totalStores: 0, totalRatings: 0, averageRating: 0, ratingDistribution: [], topStores: [], recentActivity: [], monthlyTrends: [], categoryDistribution: [] }); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); useEffect(() => { fetchEnhancedStats(); }, []); const fetchEnhancedStats = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/analytics/dashboard'); setStats(response.data); } catch (error) { console.error('Failed to fetch stats:', error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; const COLORS = ['#667eea', '#764ba2', '#f093fb', '#4facfe', '#43e97b', '#fa709a', '#fee140', '#30cfd0']; if (loading) return
Loading enhanced dashboard...
; return (

{stats.averageRating.toFixed(1)} ★

entry.name} outerRadius={100} dataKey="rating" > {stats.topStores.map((entry, index) => ( ))}

Category Distribution

Recent Activity

{stats.recentActivity.map(activity => (
{activity.action === 'RATE' && '⭐'} {activity.action === 'REGISTER' && '👤'} {activity.action === 'LOGIN' && '🔐'}
{activity.userName} {activity.action.toLowerCase()}d {activity.storeName && ` ${activity.storeName}`} {activity.rating && ` with ${activity.rating} stars`} {new Date(activity.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
))}
); }; export default EnhancedDashboard;
